description_long: This is a robust, boxy tractor with a utilitarian design, featuring a large rectangular cargo bed with reinforced greenish metal panels and visible rivets. The vehicle rides on eight large, rugged tires with deep treads, suitable for heavy-duty urban or construction tasks. The front section is black with a red spider emblem, and the rear has two red stars and a matching spider motif, suggesting a custom or themed design. On top of the cargo bed, there is a small black satellite dish and a vertical antenna, indicating possible remote control or communication capabilities. The sides of the cargo bed display orange and black directional markings, adding to its industrial appearance. The tractor lacks a traditional enclosed cabin, instead having an open platform with no visible seating or operator controls.
description: A heavy-duty, boxy tractor with eight large wheels, a reinforced green cargo bed, and industrial markings. It features a black front section with a red spider emblem and visible communication equipment on top.
description_view_0: Front view shows the black front section with a red spider emblem, flanked by four large tires on each side and the open cargo bed behind.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the long, rectangular cargo bed, eight large wheels, and visible orange directional markings, as well as the satellite dish and antenna on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the green cargo bed with two red stars and a spider motif, and the full width of the vehicle's eight wheels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the cargo bed, wheels, and communication equipment, but with different orange markings visible.
attribute_wheel_configuration: eight wheels, all of similar large size, likely all-wheel drive
attribute_cabin_design: No visible operator cabin; open platform with no windows, doors, or protective structures
